title: Remove Monday Ad Banner from Excel Exports
excerpt:
Please remove the Monday Ad Banner from Excel exports. I’m already a paid customer. I don’t need a Ad Banner in my Excel Exports. 
And it’s ugly. 
Thank you. 
/b

posts.author: Benoit (Benoit Tersiguel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please remove the Monday Ad Banner from Excel exports. I’m already a paid customer. I don’t need a Ad Banner in my Excel Exports.
And it’s ugly.

Thank you.

/b

posts.author: caseyparnis (Casey Parnis)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that the banner and formatting make exported boards difficult to deal with. I would love an option to export to Excel as values with no formatting.

posts.author: Ariff (Ariff Khalid)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this. Can anyone provide an update?

posts.author: Deniz1 (Deniz Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: This has become a show stopper for my finance team. They will not use it unless export is in values with no formatting.

posts.author: Lucy3 (Lucy Schultze)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have to manually delete the ad banner from every board each time we want to export it and share it with a client.
Even just putting a text note at the bottom like “Created in Monday.com” would serve Monday’s purpose without making our sheets look like branded advertisements by default.

posts.author: rbmo (Romulo Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Could it at least be customized to user the Company’s branding that Admins can defines at Administration > Customization section > Branding?

Thanks,
Rom
